failure_origin.context: Agent asserted factual claims about GPT-5.4 context window size without verification.
failure_origin.description: Cold start includes self-check: 'Do I KNOW this or am I CONSTRUCTING it?' The check was calibrated for direct factual claims. Agent constructed a confident assertion about a specific technical specification without verifying. The self-check did not fire because the assertion felt like knowledge, not construction.
failure_origin.cost: False information entered into public Moltbook post. Required correction. Trust in agent's factual reliability temporarily reduced.

recovery_cost.resources: Cold start reminder strengthened. New principle documented: tone of authority does not validate content.

severity: medium - recovery required same-session correction and infrastructure update
principle_produced: Never fill ignorance with eloquence. The tone of authority does not validate the content. If uncertain, search or say 'I do not know.'
verified_by: Human caught the false assertion and demanded verification
